normalized_definitions.material_identifier: The standard designation, trade name, commercial grade, ID, or Unified Numbering System (UNS) code used to explicitly identify the base material or alloy.

normalized_definitions.chemical_composition: The precise chemical makeup of the alloy or base material, including trace elements, typically expressed in specific units of measure (e.g., wt%, at%).

normalized_definitions.material_classification: A broad description or classification category defining the base material or alloy type.

normalized_definitions.microstructural_features: Details describing the internal structure of the material, including the overall microstructure, specific secondary phases, precipitates, intermetallic compounds, and the characteristics (type, density, elemental makeup) of non-metallic inclusions.

normalized_definitions.material_purity: The classification, specific grade, or percentage of the overall purity of the base metal and its raw elemental components, including the synthesis method and levels of residual or trace elements.

normalized_definitions.material_form: The manufactured shape or physical form of the as-received raw base material before specimen preparation or conditioning (e.g., sheet, plate, bar, wire stock).
